title: 无标题文章
summary: Two months ago I gave my first ever live programming talk at KotlinConf. Part of my talk-writing process is lots of procrastination and distraction. This year that materialized in writing a tool to help my code stay on track during the presentation. https:// jakewharton.com/live-coding-wi th-dir-stepper/
content:
Two months ago I gave my first ever live programming talk at KotlinConf. Part of my talk-writing process is lots of procrastination and distraction. This year that materialized in writing a tool to help my code stay on track during the presentation.

https://jakewharton.com/live-coding-with-dir-stepper/
